title: Getting started
text: Start creating project split mode. creates two sibling folders: ai_project/ workspace AI agents may inspect. r_project/ local R execution workspace hidden analysis data. hard access-control system. project structure set working rules make boundary explicit.
code: library(airsetup)  airsetup(   path = "example-analysis",   mode = "split",   japanese = TRUE ) example-analysis/ +-- ai_project/ +-- r_project/

title: Getting started
text: ai_project/ contains materials support AI-assisted work. main folders : source/, analysis instructions source materials; ai_visible_data/, dummy visible data AI may inspect; ai_output/, scripts helper files generated AI; r_output/, outputs created user runs R scripts; qc/, QC evidence review materials; log/, notes decision records. generated AGENTS.md describes project rules. generated QC_STATUS.md gives QC status open review items stable entry point.

what: Keep hidden analysis data outside AI inspection
title: Getting started
text: split mode, r_project/ created next ai_project/. folder intended local R execution hidden analysis data. AI agents inspect r_project/ai_hidden_data/ directly. visible hidden data areas can share internal structure:

what: Put visible and hidden data in matching paths
title: Getting started
text: example, place small visible prostate.csv : place full analysis dataset file name : Using file name lets AI agents design scripts visible data lets R run scripts hidden data changing input root. prostate example, visible data can small CSV columns full dataset. source notes describe variables : patno, patient number; rx, treatment assignment; dtime, follow-time; status, event status; age, age baseline; hg, hemoglobin level; bm, bone metastases indicator. exact statistical analysis intentionally outside airsetup. package prepares workflow boundary.

title: Getting started
text: Place analysis instructions : instructions say create, write outputs, data boundaries must respected. typical request Codex might : Follow analysis instructions source/initial/. Create R scripts ai_output/. Use ai_visible_data/initial/ inspect column names file structure. list, open, copy, summarize, otherwise inspect ../r_project/ai_hidden_data/. request matches generated AGENTS.md: AI agents may use visible data design scripts, hidden data stays outside direct AI inspection.

title: Getting started
text: user runs R scripts locally. Scripts may write outputs : QC materials can written : airsetup force one QC method. project might use double programming, output review, row-count checks, discrepancy tables, another context-specific check. example, double-programming QC workflow : create time event variables Algorithm ; create variables Algorithm B; compare implementations; save comparison table qc/; record status QC-001 QC_STATUS.md. QC_STATUS.md declaration QC complete. running status file: checked, evidence , still needs human review.

title: Getting started
text: Use aircheck() verify required folders files exist. aircheck() returns data frame one row per required item. reports whether folder file found. makes easy confirm workspace still structure AI-assisted analysis depends .

code: @Manual{,   title = {airsetup: AI-Assisted R Workflow with QC and Clear Boundaries},   author = {gestimation Toolkit},   year = {2026},   note = {https://github.com/gestimation/airsetup, https://gestimation.github.io/airsetup/}, }

title: airsetup
text: Clear boundaries, flexible QC, traceable structure AI-assisted R analysis. airsetup creates small, opinionated folder structure R analysis projects AI agents help write scripts, inspect visible dummy data, review outputs, hidden analysis data stays outside AI-visible workspace. provide statistical analysis functions. Instead, prepares separated folders, minimal AGENTS.md, QC_STATUS.md tracker.

title: airsetup
text: can install development version airsetup GitHub :

title: airsetup
text: split mode, airsetup() creates two sibling folders: example split project root
code: library(airsetup)  project_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "my_analysis")  airsetup(   path = project_dir,   mode = "split",   japanese = TRUE )  aircheck(project_dir, mode = "split") my_analysis/ +-- ai_project/ +-- r_project/

title: airsetup
text: ai_project/ workspace AI agents may inspect edit according project rules. example AI project folder contains folders source materials, AI-visible data, AI-generated files, R outputs, QC evidence, logs: source/: source specifications, reference documents, analysis instructions. ai_visible_data/: dummy visible data AI agents may inspect. ai_output/: scripts supporting files generated AI agents. r_output/: outputs produced R scripts run user. qc/: QC evidence, review materials, comparison files, discrepancy notes. log/: notes, decision records, investigation logs. AGENTS.md: working rules AI agents. QC_STATUS.md: current QC status open review items. split mode, r_project/ also created next ai_project/. ![example R project folder contains hidden-data area local reminders: ai_hidden_data/: analysis data AI agents must inspect directly. .gitignore: defaults avoid committing hidden analysis data. README_DO_NOT_SHARE_WITH_AI.md: local reminder folder human/R execution, AI inspection.

title: airsetup
text: package separates AI can inspect R can use real analysis. visible hidden data areas share internal structure: example, dummy empty data set prostate.csv may placed ai_project/ai_visible_data/initial/, real data set prostate.csv file name data structure may placed r_project/ai_hidden_data/initial/. example AI-visible data folder example AI-hidden data folder lets AI agents design scripts visible data R scripts can run hidden data changing input root, without asking AI inspect hidden files.

title: airsetup
text: generated AGENTS.md intentionally practical. tells AI agents: folders may inspect; ../r_project/ai_hidden_data/ must listed, opened, copied, summarized, otherwise inspected; place generated scripts supporting files; R outputs QC evidence live; check QC_STATUS.md substantive work; distinguish AI risk assessment user-approved QC decisions; ask human approval decision requires domain judgment. generated file access-control mechanism. project-level working rule makes boundary explicit repeatable.

title: airsetup
text: airsetup prescribe one QC method. project might use double programming, output review, row-count checks, discrepancy tables, another context-specific workflow. package simply gives QC stable place: qc/ evidence review materials; QC_STATUS.md current status, open questions, human review items; log/ decisions investigation notes matter later. data batches, scripts, outputs, QC evidence evolve, structure keeps materials separated instead mixing one working directory.

title: Check an airsetup project structure — aircheck
Check an airsetup project structure — aircheck
text: path Parent project directory check. mode Project layout mode check. "split" checks sibling ai_project r_project folders. "ai_only" checks ai_project.

title: Check an airsetup project structure — aircheck
text: data.frame columns item, type, path, exists, required, message.

title: Check an airsetup project structure — aircheck

code: airsetup(   path,   mode = c("split", "ai_only"),   japanese = FALSE,   overwrite = FALSE )

title: Set up an AI-assisted analysis project structure — airsetup
text: path Parent directory create update. mode Project layout mode. "split" creates sibling ai_project r_project folders. "ai_only" creates ai_project. japanese Logical. TRUE, generated AGENTS.md instructs Codex write narrative output documents Japanese default. FALSE, instructs Codex use English default. override scripts, source code, schemas, explicit user instructions. overwrite Logical. TRUE, overwrite generated files already exist.

title: Set up an AI-assisted analysis project structure — airsetup
text: Invisibly returns normalized parent path.
